heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 11263 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this part such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 1992 through 1996.
notes: Amendments1992— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “To carry out this part, there are authorized to be appropriated $2,000,000 for each of fiscal years 1988 through 1991.”Pub. L. 102–507
amendments: Amendments1992— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “To carry out this part, there are authorized to be appropriated $2,000,000 for each of fiscal years 1988 through 1991.”Pub. L. 102–507
